settings.heading: Make your child the hero of their own story.
settings.lede: A beautifully bound keepsake where the child you love becomes the main character — no subscription, no recurring charge, just one book made for them.
settings.caption: Three minutes to make. A lifetime to keep.
settings.note: Printed in Quebec. Free shipping over $75 CAD.

settings.heading: Choose your story
settings.lede: Eight original tales, written by our authors, for every age and every night.

settings.title: Choose a story
settings.text: Browse our library and find the world that feels like them — bedtime, adventure, emotions, courage, family.

settings.title: Add a photo
settings.text: One clear photo of your child. Our illustrator adapts each page to their face and skin tone — never uncanny, always faithful.

settings.title: Receive the book
settings.text: Printed with care in Quebec on FSC-certified paper. On your doorstep in 5 to 8 business days.

settings.heading: Three steps to the book.
settings.lede: A few minutes to create. Delivered in days. Kept for a lifetime.
settings.aside_text: Hardcover, 24 pages, 21×21 cm. Free shipping in Canada over $75. One-time purchase — no subscription.

settings.quote: My daughter sleeps with this book. She introduces it to her friends as 'her own book.' I've never seen anything like it.
settings.name: Camille

settings.quote: Arrived before Christmas, beautifully packaged, quality worthy of an indie publisher. My grandson was speechless.
settings.name: Jean-Paul

settings.quote: As a parent I was wary of AI. But this is done with taste. The illustration is faithful, not uncanny.
settings.name: Sarah

settings.title: Privacy, guaranteed
settings.text: Photos are encrypted, used only for your book, then deleted within 30 days. Fully compliant with Quebec Law 25 and GDPR.

settings.title: Love it or it's on us
settings.text: If the book doesn't move you, we'll replace it or refund you. No fine print, no return shipping fees.

settings.title: Archive-quality print
settings.text: FSC paper 170 g/m², sewn hardcover, printed locally in Quebec. Built to last generations.

settings.heading: Made like a gift. Built to be kept.

settings.question: What do you do with my child's photo?
settings.answer: It's used only to create your book, kept encrypted, and deleted within 30 days — or instantly on request from your account. We never share photos, never train models on them, never use them for anything else.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: 5–8 business days in Canada, 7–12 days to the US and Europe. Printing takes 48 hours once you've confirmed your preview.

settings.question: Are the books available in French?
settings.answer: Yes — every story is hand-written in both French (Quebec variant) and English. You choose the language when you create the book.

settings.question: What if I don't love the final book?
settings.answer: We'll replace it or refund you. No fine print, no return shipping fees. We only ship books we'd be proud to keep ourselves.

settings.heading: Parents often ask…
settings.lede: A short list of the questions we hear most. Can't find yours? Email us directly.

settings.heading: Their next favorite story. The one where they're the hero.
settings.lede: No card required. No commitment. Just three minutes and a photo.
settings.meta: Free until you order · Printed in Quebec · Shipped across Canada
